title: nicotiana tabacum var. chinensis
intro: Nicotiana tabacum var. chinensis is a variety of the Nicotiana tabacum plant, commonly known as Chinese tobacco or Oriental tobacco. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, particularly used for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nicotiana tabacum var. chinensis include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat respiratory and digestive issues.
